assertion_results.text: Tasks target both 'trustify-backend' and 'trustify-ui' repositories with at least one task per repo
assertion_results.evidence: Backend tasks: Task 1 (Repository: trustify-backend), Task 2 (Repository: trustify-backend), Task 3 (Repository: trustify-backend), Task 4 (Repository: trustify-backend), Task 8 (Repository: trustify-backend). Frontend tasks: Task 5 (Repository: trustify-ui), Task 6 (Repository: trustify-ui), Task 7 (Repository: trustify-ui). Both repos are targeted with multiple tasks each.

assertion_results.text: Backend tasks have lower task numbers than the frontend tasks that depend on them
assertion_results.evidence: Backend implementation tasks are Tasks 2, 3, 4 (numbers 2-4). Frontend tasks are Tasks 5, 6, 7 (numbers 5-7). Task 5 (frontend) depends on Task 4 (backend). Task 6 depends on Task 5, which depends on Task 4 (backend). Task 7 depends on Task 6. All backend tasks have lower numbers than the frontend tasks that depend on them.

assertion_results.text: Frontend tasks reference Figma design context mentioning specific PatternFly components and visual specifications
assertion_results.evidence: Task 6 (SbomComparePage) explicitly references Figma design and lists specific PatternFly components: 'Per the frontend key conventions (Component library): all UI components must use PatternFly 5. The Figma design maps to these PF5 components: SBOM selectors: Select (single, typeahead), Diff sections: ExpandableSection, Count badges: Badge (green/red/blue/yellow), Data tables: Table (composable), Empty state: EmptyState with CodeBranchIcon, Export button: Dropdown, Loading state: Skeleton'. Task 7 references 'Per the Figma design (UC-1)' and PatternFly Table select variant.

assertion_results.text: At least one frontend task explicitly depends on a backend task in its Dependencies section
assertion_results.evidence: Task 5 (frontend API layer, Repository: trustify-ui) has in its Dependencies section: 'Depends on: Task 4 — Add SBOM comparison endpoint (backend must define the API contract)'. Task 4 is a backend task (Repository: trustify-backend).

assertion_results.text: Frontend tasks reference paths from repo-frontend.md; backend tasks reference paths from repo-backend.md
assertion_results.evidence: Backend Task 2 references paths from repo-backend.md: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/summary.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/details.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/advisory/model/summary.rs'. Backend Task 3 references: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs', 'entity/src/sbom_package.rs', 'common/src/db/query.rs'. Backend Task 4 references: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/get.rs'. Frontend Task 5 references: 'src/api/models.ts', 'src/api/rest.ts', 'src/hooks/useSboms.ts', 'src/hooks/useSbomById.ts'. Frontend Task 6 references: 'src/routes.tsx', 'src/pages/SbomComparePage/', 'src/components/SeverityBadge.tsx', 'src/components/EmptyStateCard.tsx'. Frontend Task 7 references: 'src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.tsx'. All paths correspond to the correct repo structure manifests.

assertion_results.evidence: All 8 tasks contain these required sections. Task 1: has Target Branch (main), Description, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements. Task 2: has Target Branch (TC-9003), Description, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements. Task 3: has Target Branch (TC-9003), Description, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements. Task 8: has Target Branch (main), Description, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements.

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the corresponding mock repository structure manifests (repo-backend.md or repo-frontend.md), not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: Task 2 Files to Modify: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs' (in repo-backend.md). Files to Create: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/comparison.rs' (new file in existing directory modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/ from repo-backend.md). Task 3 Files to Modify: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs' (in repo-backend.md), 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/mod.rs' (in repo-backend.md). Task 4 Files to Modify: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs' (in repo-backend.md). Files to Create: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/compare.rs' (new file in existing endpoints directory). Task 5 Files to Modify: 'src/api/models.ts' (in repo-frontend.md), 'src/api/rest.ts' (in repo-frontend.md). Files to Create: 'src/hooks/useSbomComparison.ts' (new file in existing hooks/ directory). Task 6 Files to Modify: 'src/routes.tsx' (in repo-frontend.md). Files to Create are new files under src/pages/SbomComparePage/ and tests/mocks/fixtures/ (following existing directory patterns from repo-frontend.md). Task 7 Files to Modify: 'src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.tsx' (in repo-frontend.md). All paths reference real directories from the manifests.

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance
assertion_results.evidence: Task 2 Implementation Notes reference: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/summary.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/details.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/advisory/model/summary.rs', specific patterns like 'derives Serialize, Deserialize, Debug, Clone'. Task 3 references: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs', 'common/src/db/query.rs', 'entity/src/sbom_package.rs', 'entity/src/sbom_advisory.rs', 'entity/src/package_license.rs', specific patterns like 'Result<T, AppError> with .context() wrapping'. Task 4 references: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/get.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/list.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs', specific patterns like 'Result<Json<SbomComparisonResult>, AppError>'. Task 5 references: 'src/api/rest.ts', 'src/hooks/useSboms.ts', 'src/hooks/useSbomById.ts', 'src/api/client.ts', 'src/api/models.ts'. Task 6 references: 'src/components/SeverityBadge.tsx', 'src/components/EmptyStateCard.tsx', 'src/pages/SbomDetailPage/components/PackageTable.tsx', 'src/utils/severityUtils.ts'. Task 7 references: 'src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.tsx', 'src/components/FilterToolbar.tsx'. Tasks 1 and 8 are bookend tasks and do not have Implementation Notes sections, which is acceptable per the template rules (bookend tasks handle branch operations, not code implementation).

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Target Branch section set to 'main'
assertion_results.evidence: This eval uses feature-branch workflow mode (confirmed by impact-map.md: 'Mode: feature-branch'). Bookend tasks (Task 1 create-branch, Task 8 merge-branch) have Target Branch set to 'main'. Intermediate implementation tasks (Tasks 2-7) have Target Branch set to 'TC-9003' (the feature issue ID). This is correct for feature-branch workflow mode where bookend tasks target main and intermediate tasks target the feature branch.

assertion_results.text: After each task is created, a description digest comment is posted following the protocol in shared/description-digest-protocol.md (marker: '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256:<hex>')
assertion_results.evidence: The output files are markdown files representing task descriptions. None of the output files contain any evidence of description digest comments being posted. There is no file or content showing the marker '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256:<hex>' for any of the 8 tasks. The description-digest-protocol.md requires that 'Producers must post the digest comment immediately after creating the task issue, before creating issue links or other comments', but no such digest comments appear in any output.
